Body.Content:
You can now declutter your calendar by hiding declined meetings. If you’ve enabled “Show declined meetings” in New Outlook or Outlook for the Web, you’ll see a setting in Outlook Mobile to hide them for a simpler view.

GA date: January CY2026

message.Title: Outlook: Filter Out Declined Meetings in Outlook Mobile
